name: Time Source
description: Time source / real-time clock for the device. When `time:` is configured as a bare mapping (no `- platform:` list — the legacy form), ESPHome implicitly uses the `homeassistant` platform. Modern configs select a platform explicitly: available platforms are `bm8563`, `ds1307`, `gps`, `homeassistant`, `host`, `pcf85063`, `pcf8563`, `rx8130`, `sntp`, `zigbee`.
